name: ACRO BIOMEDICAL CO., LTD.
summary: Since January 30, 2017, following a change of control, our business has been the development and marketing nutritional products that promote wellness and a healthy lifestyle. Our revenue to date has resulted from the purchase of products from three suppliers in the Republic of China (Taiwan), one of which accounted for all of our purchases in the year ended December 31, 2022.
